name: midnight-lounge
description: Midnight Lounge - premium e-commerce storefront built with Fable 5, Elmish and Feliz

scripts.start: dotnet tool restore && dotnet fable watch src/App.fsproj -o build --run vite --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.dev: dotnet tool restore && dotnet fable watch src/App.fsproj -o build --run vite
scripts.build: dotnet tool restore && dotnet fable src/App.fsproj -o build && vite build
